title: Type launcher label, default-checked Enter, keep prompt visible above sheets
action: Three mobile terminal UI tweaks: (1) footer reply-open button label Reply -> Type; (2) reply sheet 'Press Enter (submit)' checkbox defaults checked; (3) when the reply or keys bottom sheet opens, reserve a bottom inset on .term-viewport equal to (sheet.offsetHeight - termBar.offsetHeight + 8px gap) and scroll the viewport to the bottom so the agent's prompt stays visible above the sheet; clear the inset on close.

truths: Footer button that opens the reply sheet reads Type
Press Enter (submit) checkbox is checked on first open
Opening either sheet keeps the bottom of the terminal visible above the sheet and scrolls to bottom
Closing either sheet restores the viewport padding
prohibitions: Do not change the reply/keys sheet markup beyond the checkbox default and button label
Do not touch send/keys behavior or the polling loop

verify: cd web && npm run bundle && npm run test -- --run

trace.outcome: Type launcher label; Enter-submit default on; sheets keep the agent prompt visible above them
trace.verify_output: orchestrator re-run: tsc --noEmit clean, vite build ok (index-CEaWcWPS.js 305.82kB), vitest 20 passed (4 files)
trace.verify_command: cd web && npm run bundle && npm run test -- --run
